audit_object: R900008 and R900009 — same-day same-amount same-type potential duplicate
policy_questions: Does Article 10 (same invoice duplicate) apply? Requires same invoice across records.
Does Article 11 (split to avoid approval) apply? Requires same employee within 7 days.
data_questions: Are R900008 and R900009 on the same invoice?
Are they from the same employee?
Are the amounts, dates, and types the same?
evidence_requirements: Detail records for R900008 and R900009
execution_steps: Fetch policy for duplicate reimbursement rules
Compare invoice numbers and employee IDs
Determine if any policy rule is violated

reasons: One rule (duplicate reimbursement) with simple record comparison
No policy version ambiguity (2025 policy in effect)
No aggregation, grouping, or joins needed
No thresholds or exemptions at boundary

subagent_plan.reason: Complexity 1: compact mode sufficient; two-record direct lookup, no native subagent needed

stopping_conditions: Invoice numbers compared: same → anomaly; different → no anomaly
Employee IDs compared: same + within scope → check Article 11; different → no Article 11 concern
